name: GOLFTEC Katy
about: GOLFTEC Katy is a golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors, to provide personalized coaching. Services include private lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships designed to improve golf performance through detailed swing analysis and feedback. The Katy location is part of a national network with a standardized approach to golf instruction and technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized coaching plans tailored to individual player goals
Club fitting services that deliver an average of 21 more yards off the tee

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and GOLFTEC also provides club fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, so it's recommended to check directly with the Katy location for their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and fitting rather than full simulator play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for younger golfers to learn and improve their skills.
